:PROPERTIES:
:ID: 6a18169e-c629-433f-bf7a-6ddd90ec72ac
:END:
#+title: Login
#+description: Login
#+type: recipe
#+version: 2
#+level: cross
#+filetags: :recipe:http:authentication_verb:
#+created: 2026-05-21
#+updated: 2026-05-21

Authenticate with username and password.

#+begin_src verb :wrap src json
post /auth/login
Accept: application/json
Content-Type: application/json

{
    "username": "newuser3",
    "password": "Secure-Password-123"
}
#+end_src

#+RESULTS:
#+begin_src json
HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Content-Type: application/json
Content-Length: 592
Server: ores-http-server-v1
Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *

{
  "success": true,
  "account_id": "019b9856-215c-7fd4-b139-11821e39d80a",
  "username": "newuser3",
  "email": "newuser3@example.com",
  "password_reset_required": false,
  "token": "eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..xg6PT_c59qYsgKniBfdP_TIKyAwkv0bNOOi3d4Yu8aU"
}
#+end_src
